title: giacfalk/ggACene: v1.0
author: Giacomo Falchetta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
ggACene (global gridded Air Conditioning energy) projections, v1.0 
 To reproduce the model and generate the dataset from scratch, please refer to the following steps: 
 
   Download input data "replication_package_input_data.7z" by cloning the following Zenodo data repository https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.12541994  
 
   Decompress the folder using 7-Zip (https://www.7-zip.org/download.html)  
 
   Open RStudio and adjust the path folder in the sourcer.R script  
 
   Run the sourcer.R script to train the ML model, make projections, and represent result files
steps_raw:
ggACene (global gridded Air Conditioning energy) projections, v1.0 
 To reproduce the model and generate the dataset from scratch, please refer to the following steps: 
 
   Download input data "replication_package_input_data.7z" by cloning the following Zenodo data repository https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.12541994  
 
   Decompress the folder using 7-Zip (https://www.7-zip.org/download.html)  
 
   Open RStudio and adjust the path folder in the sourcer.R script  
 
   Run the sourcer.R script to train the ML model, make projections, and represent result files
